steps.prompt: Scan {project_dir} for security vulnerabilities related to: {description}. Use static analysis tools, check dependencies for known CVEs, and identify common vulnerability patterns (injection, auth flaws, misconfigurations, insecure defaults).

Analyze the scan results at scan-results.md. Assess severity (Critical/High/Medium/Low) for each finding using CVSS scoring. Identify root causes, attack vectors, and exploitability. Group findings by category and prioritize remediation order.

Write a security audit report from analysis.md with an executive summary, prioritized findings table, per-finding details (description, severity, evidence, remediation steps), and a remediation roadmap.

Review the security report at security-report.md with a security lens. Verify that remediation recommendations follow secure coding best practices, that no findings have been understated, and that the report is actionable for the engineering team.

checkpoint_config.message: Review security-report.md. Approve to complete audit.
